testcase.name: testInvalidEmailSubscription

failure.message: Test Failed: Coupon dialog appeared even though the email was invalid! expected [false] but found [true]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Test Failed: Coupon dialog appeared even though the email was invalid! expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at testcase.name: testViewPost
